author: Th3OTh3rGuy
name: hijack
short: A button-based console terminal hacking game.
description: Allows users to interact with a button-based UI dashboard and breach other users' firewalls using discord.ui components.
end_user_data_statement: This cog stores Discord User IDs temporarily to track game session firewall integrity. This data can be deleted at any time upon user request or when the game session ends.
